message:
🌱 surrealdb: Feature: Rust SDK multiple functions within a Transaction  (#1895)

* 🌱 Add surrealdb: Feature: Rust SDK multiple functions within a Transaction  mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* 🌱 Add surrealdb: Feature: Rust SDK multiple functions within a Transaction  mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix surrealdb Rust SDK transactions mission resolution and remove closed PR

Replace raw community comment resolution with clean summary. Remove
reference to PR #5317 which was closed without merging — the feature
was implemented natively by the SurrealDB team in v3.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "surrealdb-2733-feature-rust-sdk-multiple-functions-within-a-transaction",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "surrealdb: Feature: Rust SDK multiple functions within a Transaction ",
+    "description": "Feature: Rust SDK multiple functions within a Transaction . Requested by 55+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current surrealdb setup",
+        "description": "Verify your surrealdb version and configuration:\n```bash\nsurreal version\n```\nThis feature requires a working surrealdb installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review surrealdb configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant surrealdb configuration:\n### Is your feature request related to a problem?\n\nThe Rust SDK transaction statements are not documented at"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Feature: Rust SDK multiple functions within a Transaction ",
+        "description": "This implies that Transactions are not thread safe. Beginning a connection in one thread creates a race between closing it and making unrelated queries in other threads (as previously discussed). \n\nI'm not even sure if this is true because of the aforementioned. It sounds like all queries are not thread safe, because of the eager execution (even chained methods).\n\nI agree that there needs to be a separate struct that holds transactions, which are not forwarded to the database eagerly, but\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"Feature: Rust SDK multiple functions within a Transaction \" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "SurrealDB implemented native transaction support in v3, allowing multiple functions within a single transaction via the Rust SDK. The original community PR #5317 was closed as the feature was implemented natively by the SurrealDB team.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },

+        "description": "Review the relevant surrealdb configuration:\n### Is your feature request related to a problem?\n\nThe Rust SDK transaction statements are not documented at"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Feature: Rust SDK multiple functions within a Transaction ",
+        "description": "Thank you for submitting this pull request. We really appreciate you spending the time to work on SurrealDB. \ud83d\ude80 \ud83c\udf89 \n\n## What is the motivation?\n\nWhen I started using SurrealDB with Rust, I noticed that there was no way to create multiple statements in a single transaction (see: https://github.com/surrealdb/surrealdb/issues/2733).\n\nI really needed this feature as it's much more clean and ergonomic than to manually start writing queries in a single transaction.\n\n**Note**: This is a living draft\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"Feature: Rust SDK multiple functions within a Transaction \" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "SurrealDB implemented native transaction support in v3, allowing multiple functions within a single transaction via the Rust SDK. The original community PR #5317 was closed as the feature was implemented natively by the SurrealDB team.",

+    }
+  },
